company.name: BEJADY Gelato (百佳迪)
company.fullName: 广州百佳迪智能设备有限公司
company.specialty: Commercial gelato machine manufacturing & OEM/ODM services
company.coreBelief: 20 years of export technology, one hit-product solution

brandVoice.slogan: Gelato shouldn't be a luxury. It's just been packaged as one by information asymmetry.
brandVoice.coreMessage: What costs 100,000+ yuan to learn in Italy, we deliver with equipment and recipes for 20,000 yuan — including training.
brandVoice.promise: The hit recipes you're looking for are already tested in our AI database.

machineFeatures.cooling: Italian-standard refrigeration system with precision temperature control
machineFeatures.homogenization: Industrial-grade homogenization process for consistent texture
machineFeatures.priceAdvantage: 1/5 to 1/10 the price of equivalent imported machines

oemServices: Full branding customization (logo, color, panel, packaging)
Voltage and frequency configuration for any market
Content support: product photography, video strategy
After-sales: remote diagnostics, spare parts, on-site service

flavorCategories: Fruit sorbets: mango passionfruit, strawberry berry, lemon, watermelon mint
Innovative Chinese: five-rice gelato, black sesame, sea salt pineapple
Premium: mascarpone fig, bergamot yuzu sorbet
Trending: Thai milk tea, osmanthus oolong (Boyajuexian), salted caramel

customerPersonas.painPoint: Don't know products or content, don't know how to start
customerPersonas.solution: Full hit-product package including video production guidance

keySellingPoints: 20 years of export-grade refrigeration manufacturing quality
Same quality as Italian machines at 1/5-1/10 the price
20,000 yuan entry point, 10x output, 10-year lifespan, 80-90%保值
Full product line: from compact commercial to industrial production line
Proprietary AI recipe database covering 35+ recipes
3 major training systems integrated: Carpigiani × ICIF × Gelato University
Full-stack service: equipment + recipe + training + content marketing

brandStory.origin: Founded in 2006 as a precision parts workshop in Guangzhou
brandStory.chinaStrategy: In 2024, BEJADY decided to build its own brand: speak with our own name, deliver 20 years of accumulated expertise to our own people.

marketComparison.infoAsymmetry: The price gap is not machine quality — it's information asymmetry

consumptionData.globalGelatoConsumptionTrend: Europe leads consumption; Italy has highest per-capita gelato consumption
consumptionData.keyInsight: Artisan gelato is the fastest-growing production method at 21.7% CAGR

artisanGelato.insight: Consumers willing to pay 2-3x more for artisanal vs conventional
artisanGelato.trend: Premiumization driving demand for authentic, handcrafted small-batch production

healthTrends.highProtein: 30% CAGR for protein claims in dairy
healthTrends.cleanLabel: Natural sweeteners, fewer additives, organic ingredients trending

flavorTrends.pistachio: 10% growth in social discussions, 60% Google search increase since 2019

sustainability.ecoPackaging: Biodegradable cups, recyclable materials becoming standard
sustainability.localSourcing: Locally sourced ingredients and transparent supply chains valued
sustainability.carbonReduction: Carbon footprint reduction is key differentiator

hygieneRequirements.foodZones: Three zones: food zone, splash zone, non-food zone

fda.scope: All food-contact materials must be FDA-compliant

rohs.scope: Restriction of hazardous substances in electrical equipment

technicalStandards.efficiencyStandard: Energy efficiency regulations vary by market (EU Ecodesign, US DOE)
technicalStandards.noiseLimit: ≤ 75 dB(A) per EN ISO 4871 for commercial food machinery
technicalStandards.ipProtection: At least IP54 in wet processing areas

overrun.keyInsight: 膨胀率是 Gelato 和美式冰淇淋最核心的工艺区别。Gelato 低膨胀率意味着每口更浓的风味和更密的质地。

batchFreezerParameters.note: 学术文献中的 140-250 rpm 为大型工业批次机参数，商用 Gelato 机实际转速更高

airCellDynamics.study: Development of air cells in a batch ice cream freezer (Sofjan & Hartel, 2004)
keyFindings: Air cell size decreased progressively during freezing — freezing is necessary to stabilize small air cells
Fat level and emulsifier had no significant effect on air cell size
Stabilizer led to smaller initial air cells
Air cell size reduction correlated to slurry viscosity during freezing

microstructureEvolution.study: Microstructural evolution of ice cream after start-up in a continuous scraped surface freezer (Gallagher & Hartel, 2025)
keyFindings: Microstructure stabilization occurs around mean residence time (~4.8 min)
Ice crystallization is the primary driver for microstructure formation
Ice crystals → increased viscosity → air incorporation → fat destabilization

unsteadyAgitation.study: Advanced control of microstructure in ice cream by agitation and mixing during freezing process (2024)
keyFindings: Periodic reversal of rotation direction enhances scraping efficiency
Improved heat transfer, air entrainment, and fat globule agglomeration
Better melt resistance through microstructure control

keyDifferences: Gelato 脂肪含量低、膨胀率低、出品温度高 — 口感更密、风味更浓
Gelato 批次冷冻机搅速慢，刻意减少空气混入
硬冰淇淋批次冷冻机搅速高，最大限度混入空气
Gelato 出机后直接进展示柜，无需硬化步骤
硬冰淇淋出机后需在急冻柜硬化到 -18°C

keyFactors: 总固形物（糖+乳固形物+稳定剂）决定口感和冰点
糖体系（蔗糖、葡萄糖、右旋糖）需平衡，避免冰渣或过软
乳化剂影响脂肪失稳和膨胀率响应
稳定剂（瓜尔豆胶、刺槐豆胶、卡拉胶）控制抗融性和热冲击
老化（冷藏4-24小时）对脂肪结晶和稳定剂水化至关重要
batchFreezerWorkflow: 1. 配好混合液 → 2. 老化 → 3. 倒入批次冷冻机
4. 冷冻10-20分钟 → 5. 出料进展示柜 → 6. 清洗机器
artisanProductionGuidelines.source: Tharp & Young on Gelato / Dairy Foods
